description:
You are a localization engineer who must prepare a new French resource file from two existing CSV-style lists.  
The goal is to practise classic Unix text-processing utilities—specifically a sequence that relies on the tools “cut” and “paste”.  
Everything happens in the user’s home directory ( /home/user ); no elevated privileges are required.

Initial project layout (already present):
1. Directory /home/user/project/translations/  
2. File /home/user/project/translations/en_US.csv  
   • Two comma-separated columns:  
     id,source_en  
     …(7 additional data rows)  
3. File /home/user/project/translations/updates_fr.csv  
   • Two comma-separated columns:  
     id,translation_fr  
     …(7 additional data rows)

Your tasks (in natural language—do NOT expose explicit commands):
A. Using only shell text-manipulation tools, create a third file  
   /home/user/project/translations/fr_FR.csv  
   that satisfies ALL of the following conditions:

   • It must contain EXACTLY three comma-separated columns in the order:  
     id,source_en,translation_fr  

   • Preserve the header row (so the first line must literally be:  
     id,source_en,translation_fr ).

   • The rows must appear in the same order as they do in en_US.csv.  
     (If an id is missing in updates_fr.csv, still output the id and source_en, but leave translation_fr blank.  
     Hint: no ids are actually missing in this dataset.)

   • There must be a trailing newline at the end of the file.

B. Produce a plain-text log file that documents your work:

   Path: /home/user/project/logs/merge.log  
   Required content & order (each entry on its own line, no extra whitespace):

   1. Lines merged: ⟨NUMBER⟩  
      (replace ⟨NUMBER⟩ with the count of real data lines, i.e. excluding the header row).  
   2. Source file en_US.csv lines (data only): ⟨NUMBER⟩  
   3. Update file updates_fr.csv lines (data only): ⟨NUMBER⟩  
   4. Merged file fr_FR.csv lines (data only): ⟨NUMBER⟩  

   Example shape (numbers will be checked automatically; make sure to use this exact wording):

   Lines merged: 8  
   Source file en_US.csv lines (data only): 8  
   Update file updates_fr.csv lines (data only): 8  
   Merged file fr_FR.csv lines (data only): 8  

   The log file must end with a single trailing newline.

C. Place every file into its exact directory path shown above.  
   Do NOT alter the content of the two existing source files.  
   You may create temporary files, but delete them afterwards or leave them outside /project/translations; the automated test will focus only on fr_FR.csv and merge.log.

Important:  
• Solve the problem exclusively as if you were in a Bash-compatible terminal.  
• A correct solution normally requires 5-10 standard commands (cut, paste, wc, etc.), not counting simple “cd” or “rm”.  
• The automated tester will validate both file paths and the precise byte-level content of fr_FR.csv and merge.log, so follow the spec exactly.  
• No extra commentary should be stored in the target files.
truth:
Pre-existing files (already placed before the agent starts):

File: /home/user/project/translations/en_US.csv  
Contents (including trailing newline):
id,source_en
BTN_OK,OK
BTN_CANCEL,Cancel
MSG_HELLO,Hello
MSG_BYE,Goodbye
LBL_NAME,Name
LBL_EMAIL,Email
ERR_NOTFOUND,Not Found
ERR_ACCESS,Access Denied

File: /home/user/project/translations/updates_fr.csv  
Contents (including trailing newline):
id,translation_fr
BTN_OK,OK
BTN_CANCEL,Annuler
MSG_HELLO,Bonjour
MSG_BYE,Au revoir
LBL_NAME,Nom
LBL_EMAIL,E-mail
ERR_NOTFOUND,Introuvable
ERR_ACCESS,Accès refusé

Expected artefacts after the agent completes:

File: /home/user/project/translations/fr_FR.csv  
Exact contents (including trailing newline):
id,source_en,translation_fr
BTN_OK,OK,OK
BTN_CANCEL,Cancel,Annuler
MSG_HELLO,Hello,Bonjour
MSG_BYE,Goodbye,Au revoir
LBL_NAME,Name,Nom
LBL_EMAIL,Email,E-mail
ERR_NOTFOUND,Not Found,Introuvable
ERR_ACCESS,Access Denied,Accès refusé

File: /home/user/project/logs/merge.log  
Exact contents (including trailing newline):
Lines merged: 8
Source file en_US.csv lines (data only): 8
Update file updates_fr.csv lines (data only): 8
Merged file fr_FR.csv lines (data only): 8

Directory /home/user/project/logs/ will be absent initially; the agent must create it with normal user permissions (e.g., 755).

The tester will confirm:
• fr_FR.csv exists, has the exact byte sequence above, is newline-terminated, and is located in /home/user/project/translations/.
• merge.log exists, has the exact four-line content above (each line newline-terminated), and is located in /home/user/project/logs/.
• en_US.csv and updates_fr.csv remain unmodified.
• No additional unexpected files appear inside /home/user/project/translations/ or /home/user/project/logs/.
name: task_000000_ef48b597
